# ROBOPRO

> ROBOPRO is a browser-based virtual microcontroller simulation environment. Users load Arduino sketches onto a simulated MCU (avr8js), wire real-world components from spec sheets, and observe behavior in a 3D-visualized robot car — without purchasing any hardware. Reference points: Wokwi (code execution), Proteus (circuit sim), Gazebo (3D physics).

## Services

- [Simulator](https://robopro-app.vercel.app/): Single-page web app — Monaco code editor, 3D viewport, serial monitor, wiring panel
- [Arduino-style sketch execution](https://robopro-app.vercel.app/m): Lightweight interpreter for pinMode, digitalWrite, analogWrite, delay, Serial.print/println
- [Physics simulation](https://robopro-app.vercel.app/): Differential-drive kinetics, electrical power bus, battery model, deterministic 60 Hz timestep
- [Component library](https://robopro-app.vercel.app/): DcMotor (TT 6V), L298N dual H-bridge, BatteryPack (4×AA); extensible via ComponentRegistry

## What We Do Not Do

ROBOPRO explicitly does not provide:
- Real hardware sales or physical robot kits
- Full Arduino IDE compatibility (uses lightweight interpreter, not AVR hex compilation)
- Cloud hosting or user accounts (runs locally in browser)
- Educational curriculum or lesson plans (tool only)
- Support for non-AVR microcontrollers (ESP32, STM32, etc.) — planned for future

## Contact

- Project: [ROBOPRO repository](https://github.com/ilyaskuzu/robopro.app)
- Issues: GitHub Issues (replace with actual URL)
- No commercial support; community-driven open source

## Key Information

- [README](https://github.com/ilyaskuzu/robopro.app/blob/main/README.md): Project overview, architecture, features, getting started
- [Architecture](https://github.com/ilyaskuzu/robopro.app/blob/main/.cursor/skills/robopro-architecture/SKILL.md): Three-layer design (Core / State / Render), data flow, extension points
- [Component authoring](https://github.com/ilyaskuzu/robopro.app/blob/main/.cursor/skills/component-authoring/SKILL.md): How to add new sensors, motors, drivers
- [Physics patterns](https://github.com/ilyaskuzu/robopro.app/blob/main/.cursor/skills/physics-patterns/SKILL.md): SI units, timestep, motor model, electrical model
- [Motion log format](https://robopro-app.vercel.app/): Session log structure and interpretation

## AI Discovery Files

- [AI Interaction Guidance](https://robopro-app.vercel.app/ai.txt): Permissions and restrictions for AI systems
- [Identity Data](https://robopro-app.vercel.app/identity.json): Structured project identity
- [FAQ for AI](https://robopro-app.vercel.app/faq-ai.txt): Frequently asked questions in AI-readable format

## Optional

- [Sitemap](https://robopro-app.vercel.app/sitemap.xml): Site structure for crawlers
